rulings.Case Title: BANNING MICKLOW BULL & LOPEZ VS WINSTON
rulings.Rulings: MOTION FOR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION IS GRANTED WITH RESPECT TO THE FRAUD ALLEGATIONS IN PARAGRAPH 54 OF THE FIRST AMENDED CROSS-COMPLAINT. THOSE ALLEGATIONS ARE BARRED BY THE THREE-YEAR STATUTE OF LIMITATIONS IN CCP SECTION 338. MOTION FOR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION IS DENIED IN ALL OTHER RESPECTS. THERE ARE TRIABLE ISSUES OF FACT AS TO WHETHER THE REPRESENTATION WAS CONTINUOUS, THEREBY TOLLING THE APPLICABLE LIMITATIONS PERIODS. (JH)

rulings.Calendar Matter: Amended Motion To Strike Under Ccp Section 425.16(B) & For Costs And Atty'S Fees; Declaration; Amended P & A; Pos
rulings.Rulings: GRANT SPECIAL MOTION TO STRIKE FIRST, THIRD, FOURTH, FIFTH, SEVENTH, AND EIGHTH CAUSES OF ACTION. DENY SPECIAL MOTION TO STRIKE AND OVERRULE DEMURRER AS TO 2ND CAUSE OF ACTION BREACH OF CONTRACT. SINCE THE ALLEGATIONS REGARDING THE CONTACTING OF FORMER TENANTS AND CONDUCT IN PRIOR LITIGATION HAVE BEEN STRIKEN, THE BREACH OF CONTRACT CLAIM IS NOW BASED ON FAILURES IN ENFORCING THE CCRs AND MAY CONTINUE. DENY SPECIAL MOTION TO STRIKE 8TH CAUSE OF ACTION FOR INJUNCTION REMOVING PATE AND PESKIN FROM BOARD BECAUSE CAUSE OF ACTION NOT CLEARLY ARISING FROM PROTECTED CONDUCT. COURT ON OWN MOTION STRIKES PARAGRAPHS 91, 92, AND 94 FROM THE NINTH CAUSE OF ACTION FOR INJUNCTION, AND DENIES SPECIAL MOTION TO STRIKE AS IT RELATES TO COMPELLING ENFORCEMENT OF CCRs. (CW)

rulings.Calendar Matter: Amended Notice Of Motion To Stay Proceedings Pending Appeal; P & A; Declaration; Pos
rulings.Rulings: DENY MOTION FOR STAY. (CW)
